title: Tune batching against the latency SLO
description: Sweep batch size and queue timeout under load to find the point that maximizes throughput while keeping p99 under the SLO.
body: Steps: 1. Define the latency SLO (target p99) and target QPS. 2. Load-test at increasing batch size and queue-wait combinations. 3. For each, record throughput, p99, and GPU utilization. 4. Pick the largest batch/wait that still meets p99, not the absolute max throughput. 5. Lock the config and re-verify under burst. Rollback point: revert to the prior batching config if p99 regresses. Validation: chosen config meets p99 at target QPS with high utilization; tuning for peak throughput alone will quietly push the tail past the SLO.
